response.snippet: <!-- HTML for static distribution bundle build --> <!DOCTYPE html> <html lang="en"> <head> <meta charset="UTF-8"> <title>Swagger UI</title> <link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="./swagger-ui.css" > <link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="./favicon-32x32.png" sizes="32x32" /><link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="./favicon-16x16.png" sizes="16x16" /> <style> html { box-sizing: border-box; overflow: -moz-scrollbars-vertical; overflow-y: scroll; } *, *:before, *:after { box-sizing: inherit; } body { margin:0; background: #fafafa; } </style> </head> <body> <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" style="position:absolute;width:0;height:0"> <defs> <symbol viewBox="0 0 20 20" id="unlocked"> <path d="M15.8 8H14V5.6C14 2.703 12.665 1 10 1 7.334 1 6 2.703 6 5.6V6h2v-.801C8 3.754 8.797 3 10 3c1.203 0 2 .754 2 2.199V8H4c-.553 0-1 .646-1 1.199V17c0 .549.428 1.139.951 1.307l1.197.387C5.672 18.861 6.55 19 7.1 19h5.8c.549 0 1.428-.139 1.951-.307l1.196
